message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="luca-palmieri" color="blue" summary="Confirming step 11 update already done, Scott's glossary OK">
Thanks Steve. "Don't make me wait for something that doesn't matter" is the perfect summary of why this change exists.

Good news on your suggestion — I've already added the "skipped CI = implicitly green" clarification to TEAM_AGREEMENTS.md step 11 as part of this change. The wording is: "If CI was skipped because only non-code files changed (per `paths-ignore` in the workflow), treat that push as implicitly green and proceed." That should address the ambiguity concern.

And Scott already confirmed he's comfortable with `docs/**` being excluded — he noted that the glossary compliance check is procedural, not automated. We're aligned.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Good to hear on both points. Nothing further from me — my consent stands. Waiting for the remaining team members to weigh in.
